items.title: JPMorgan Chase's (NYSE:JPM) Shareholders Will Receive A Bigger Dividend Than Last Year
items.description: The board of JPMorgan Chase & Co. ( NYSE:JPM ) has announced that it will be paying its dividend of $1.50 on the 31st...

items.title: This Blue-Chip Dividend Stock Just Raised Its Payout by 7%. Should You Buy Shares Here?
items.description: J.P. Morgan’s recent 7.1% dividend increase to $1.50 per share, backed by record earnings and a new $50 billion share buyback plan, highlights strong capital management and signals confidence in sustained shareholder returns despite sector headwinds.

items.title: Jim Cramer Says the Next Trillion-Dollar Stock is “More Likely to Be the Stock of JPMorgan”
items.description: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) is one of the stocks stocks Jim Cramer recently discussed. Cramer said that it could be the next trillion-dollar stock. He stated: “The anomaly this time, it looks like the next trillion-dollar stock won’t be Eli Lilly. If anything, it’s more likely to be the stock of JPMorgan, a bank… […]

items.title: Former Intel Directors Call For Trump And Nvidia To Take Chip Giant Private: 'Hope Is Not A Strategy'
items.description: Former Intel board member is proposing a government-backed privatization to unlock shareholder value after Nvidia's $5 billion investment.
